composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py to ensure full functionality of the RealEstate web application. This includes maintaining all existing routes and data handling logic, ensuring proper integration with templates, and fixing any bugs related to data reading/writing and routing. Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure that the templates rendered by main.py are correctly implemented and meet the UI/UX requirements.
composition.Programmer 2: Implement all required HTML template files for the RealEstate web application in the Flask 'templates' directory. This includes creating 'dashboard.html' with the specified elements and structure as per the requirements document, as well as all other templates referenced in main.py (e.g., search.html, property_details.html, inquiry.html, my_inquiries.html, my_favorites.html, agents.html, locations.html, location_properties.html, contact_agent.html). Ensure that each template includes the specified page title, IDs, and UI elements to support the functionality described in the requirements. Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that templates correctly support the data and routes provided by main.py.
